name: Donald J. Trump
subject: State of the Union Address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
They tried to stop me, but I’m speaking... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d76224948487081800f3d8b6a2e2b0689f038602d5528e2a33aee0d637411b50d6f434b5477a722e5ba0795c05ee62fef6f9683622f12c27)
---

Friend,

Ever since our incredible movement began, the Democrats have been against us.

And over the past few weeks, they have taken their obstruction and radicalism to a whole new UN-AMERICAN level.

First, they REFUSED to put the safety of Americans at our Southern Border above their own political interests, and then they disinvited me from speaking at the PEOPLE'S State of the Union on the original date.

As your Commander-In-Chief, I will always put the safety of America First, and whether they like it or not, **_I 'm delivering YOUR State of the Union Address on February 5th._**

Last year, we had over _3O,OOO American Patriots_ contribute to have their name proudly displayed LIVE during my State of the Union Address, and this year I expect DOUBLE.

| _**You could be the FIRST name displayed.**_
**[Please make a contribution of $5 IN THE NEXT 3 HOURS to be one of the first to have your name proudly displayed LIVE during the State of the Union Address. ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8947347c5880df2788262a5fb118ec884e293dc46f4c33441de159b83f3dd1b1d7e7ff81879933104a1425e2019b43349833d0b49d6e3dea)** **[OFFICIAL STATE OF THE UNION DONOR CARD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8947347c5880df27ccdc6489f71f3e2fb8dd7d7b5577438d1dfb9f17b0455551979bca1c255177f2b4c60ee68ce590884a6c8a9ca6b7e951)** **EMAIL : [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8947347c5880df27ba55718c3d812d287e0a52380a0562937333bd46b54a7f125e0ffcb4c0271588a8939fdd4a1f8d94fb86aea5c20eb713)**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97692f/2ae112ef/17c59b10/357a517f/3770640307/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97692f/2ae112ef/17c59b10/357a517f/3770640307/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter, we're exactly one year from the Iowa caucuses - the first step in you deciding who you'll choose to take on Donald Trump.
As we set out on this journey, we know it will take a grassroots movement coming together to restore courage and compassion to our country. We'll do it without money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists and without help from an individual super PAC - all the moneyed influences that have corrupted our politics.
Because it's only by taking on the special interests and corporations that profit by creating inequality that we can achieve Medicare for All, good schools in every ZIP code and jobs that pay a living wage.
One year out, I'll fight for your family as hard as I fight for my own. We can return power to our communities, but only by making this a community effort. Will you join our fight and build a true movement of the people?
[I'm ready to stand with you!](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/iowa-campaign-survey?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2742-su-nat-nonabel-nd")
---
We'll hit many milestones and face many tests throughout this campaign. At times, it'll be hard, but that's how we know it's right - how we know we're doing something important.
Every day of this campaign, you can count on me fighting with fearless determination, because that's what I see in the people I meet in coffee shops in Des Moines, on campuses in Durham and all across the country. Now is our time to get off the sidelines, raise our voices and fight for a future we believe in.
Thank you for all your support. Let's go.
Kirsten Gillibrand
[DONATE](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97692f/2ae112ef/17c59b10/357a5179/3770640307/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NDItc3UtbmF0LW5vbmFiZWwtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2742-su-nat-nonabel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97692f/2ae112ef/17c59b10/357a5178/3770640307/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Already one of the most vulnerable Senators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
One news source already called Sen. Shaheen [NH] one of the "most likely to lose their seats."
|
---

| | 2020 is a presidential election year. The Presidential campaigns will take up a lot of the news attention. But we can't lose sight of the fight for the U.S. Senate. **My colleague Senator Jeanne Shaheen has already been named one of the "seven senators most likely to lose their seats" in 2020.** There are some serious opponents mulling a challenge against her. So not only is she one of the most vulnerable incumbents -- her race could be one of the most expensive around. [**Jeanne and her team are getting a head-start on their grassroots fundraising and they asked for our support. Can you contribute $5 or more to keep Jeanne in the Senate?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc02/4462dc26/8f40ff3e/201eef92/427477073/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjAzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190203?refcode=sbe190203_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Jeanne Shaheen and Sherrod Brown:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc02/4462dc26/8f40ff3e/201eef91/427477073/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjAzIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190203?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe190203_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc02/4462dc26/8f40ff3e/201eef91/427477073/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjAzIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190203?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe190203_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc02/4462dc26/8f40ff3e/201eef91/427477073/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjAzIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190203?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe190203_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc02/4462dc26/8f40ff3e/201eef92/427477073/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjAzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190203?refcode=sbe190203_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** It's important to remember what a Democratic Senate can do. We could stop another Supreme Court nominee who would oppose women's rights or workers' rights. We could stop another Scott Pruitt at the Environmental Protection Agency or Betsy DeVos at the Department of Education. When Republicans try to take away people's health care, hand huge tax breaks to billionaires, or end Medicare and Social Security as we know it, the U.S. Senate can stop it. **And all of our families benefit from having Jeanne in the Senate.** I'm asking you Peter to [**give a few dollars to help build Jeanne's grassroots network.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc02/4462dc26/8f40ff3e/201eef92/427477073/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjAzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190203?refcode=sbe190203_m_other&refcode2=3268183") It may seem a bit early, but I assure you -- the other side is wasting no time whatsoever. They're already devising a strategy to defeat Jeanne in 2020. It's not too early for us to help keep her right where she is. | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc02/4462dc26/8f40ff3e/201eef92/427477073/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjAzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190203?refcode=sbe190203_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc02/4462dc26/8f40ff3e/201eef90/427477073/VEsA/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown

clean_body: One news source already called Sen. Shaheen [NH] one of the "most likely to lose their seats." | | | 2020 is a presidential election year. The Presidential campaigns will take up a lot of the news attention. But we can't lose sight of the fight for the U.S. Senate. My colleague Senator Jeanne Shaheen has already been named one of the "seven senators most likely to lose their seats" in 2020. There are some serious opponents mulling a challenge against her. So not only is she one of the most vulnerable incumbents -- her race could be one of the most expensive around. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Jeanne Shaheen and Sherrod Brown: "" "" "" "" It's important to remember what a Democratic Senate can do. We could stop another Supreme Court nominee who would oppose women's rights or workers' rights. We could stop another Scott Pruitt at the Environmental Protection Agency or Betsy DeVos at the Department of Education. When Republicans try to take away people's health care, hand huge tax breaks to billionaires, or end Medicare and Social Security as we know it, the U.S. Senate can stop it. And all of our families benefit from having Jeanne in the Senate. I'm asking you Peter to "" It may seem a bit early, but I assure you -- the other side is wasting no time whatsoever. They're already devising a strategy to defeat Jeanne in 2020. It's not too early for us to help keep her right where she is. | | | "" With gratitude, Sherrod | "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

subject: what happened in 2018 (McCaskill and Heitkamp)

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc148/2a380d31/350f6c89/f10a59/3168591088/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc148/2a380d31/350f6c89/f10a59/3168591088/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
We need to talk about Michigan.
Donald Trump won there in 2016, Democrat Gary Peters is up for reelection there in 2020, and we know that the GOP will see Gary as incredibly vulnerable.
To make matters worse, Democrats also lost a number of important voices in 2018 -- Claire McCaskill and Heidi Heitkamp to name a couple. The best way to protect Gary and stop Democrats from losing any more seats is to make sure that he's armed with strong fundraising.
Gary's team is committed to investing early and building a firewall against right-wing attacks, but they need your help. [**His fundraising is a bit behind, so please make an urgent donation -- $3 or whatever you can -- to his campaign right now to stop Republicans from buying it out from under us.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc148/2a380d31/350f6c89/f10a5a/3168591088/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMC1td2g0Z3AiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDIwM19NV0g0R1BfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020-mwh4gp?refcode=e20190203_MWH4GP_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
